raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Frontally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is in front of box_2 and reachable by the left arm; the area directly in front of the cup is free so it can be safely slid forward without colliding with other objects or falling off the table.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is pushed further toward the front edge of the table, creating clear workspace in front of box_1 and box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right side of box_2 is accessible and the region to its right is free of obstacles; the cup has been moved away so it will not be struck during the push.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is translated rightward, breaking its attachment to box_1 and leaving a sufficient gap for the arms to access the sides of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is now isolated with free space on both sides; both arms can approach laterally without interference from box_2 or the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (the darker box) is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, completing the pick-up task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is in front of box_2 and reachable by the left arm; the area directly in front of the cup is free so it can be safely slid forward without colliding with other objects or falling off the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is pushed further toward the front edge of the table, creating clear workspace in front of box_1 and box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right side of box_2 is accessible and the region to its right is free of obstacles; the cup has been moved away so it will not be struck during the push.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is translated rightward, breaking its attachment to box_1 and leaving a sufficient gap for the arms to access the sides of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is now isolated with free space on both sides; both arms can approach laterally without interference from box_2 or the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (the darker box) is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, completing the pick-up task.
